title: CPvP Macros
description: This mod contains crystal and anchor macros
body:
# CPvP Macros

CPvP Macros is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x that adds configurable Crystal, Anchor, and Double Anchor macros.

## Features

- Crystal Macro
- Anchor Macro
- Double Anchor Macro
- Hover Totem
- Configurable activation keys
- Configurable place, break, switch, glowstone, and explode delays
- Mod Menu configuration screen
- Clear setting descriptions inside the config menu
- Client-side only

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.x || 26.x
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu recommended for configuration


## Disclaimer

This mod is intended only for singleplayer, private test worlds, or environments where it is explicitly allowed. It is not made to bypass server rules or violate the rules of public servers. Use on servers is at your own risk. I am not responsible for bans, kicks, lost items, data loss, or any other consequences caused by using this mod.
